Claims-Based Assignment Flag 0/1 flag; = 1 if the beneficiary was assigned to the ACO through claims-based assignment and = 0 if the beneficiary was not assigned to the ACO through claims-based assignment.
A beneficiary may be both voluntarily aligned to the ACO and assigned through claims-based assignment and may have a flag designating they were assigned through both methods. NUM 1 - - - - - - - - - x x
